name: Only Up Spaceman
short_description: Conquer the heights of space by navigating treacherous landscapes. Battle gravity and test your skill to reach the top. Get ready for the climb of your life.
detailed_description:
In the thrilling adventure "SPACEMAN," your goal is to ascend the vast heights of space. Beginning with a single step, you’ll set out on an extraordinary quest among the stars.

One wrong move could send you floating into the Blackhole Below.

SPACEMAN challenges you to navigate treacherous celestial landscapes, battling gravity and the vast emptiness of space. Each jump and climb tests your skill and precision. Can you overcome the obstacles and reach the top, or will the lack of gravity make it too tough? Find out in this exciting test of perseverance and agility.

Prepare for the climb of your life. Remember, this won't be easy.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Greek, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Spanish - Latin America, Swedish, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
